corpus_filter: pre-2015 arXiv papers; must exist in resyn corpus or be credibly findable via citation crawl from physics+ML seed papers
curation_rule: one pre-2015 arXiv ID per side per pair; arxiv_id=null means paper was not found on arXiv or has no confirmed preprint
verification_note: All IDs systematically verified against arXiv API 2026-04-20. Several original 'verify=false' IDs were wrong (cond-mat/0010028, cond-mat/9906434). Multiple 'verify=true' IDs corrected. Papers not found on arXiv set to null.

pairs.description: Ising model (statistical physics of binary states) ↔ opinion dynamics (social physics)

side_a.title: Ising Model on Networks with an Arbitrary Distribution of Connections
side_a.notes: Phys. Rev. E 66, 016104; corrected from wrong ID cond-mat/0206144; confirmed via arXiv API 2026-04-20

side_b.title: Statistical physics of social dynamics
side_b.notes: Rev. Mod. Phys. 81, 591; confirmed via arXiv API 2026-04-20

pairs.description: Hopfield associative memory (energy-based neural networks) ↔ spin glasses (disordered magnets)
pairs.evaluable_note: side_a (Hinton CD) is a Neural Computation journal paper with no arXiv preprint

side_a.title: Training Products of Experts by Minimizing Contrastive Divergence
side_a.notes: Neural Computation 14:1771; not posted to arXiv — journal-only publication

side_b.title: The Bethe lattice spin glass revisited
side_b.notes: Eur. Phys. J. B 20, 217; confirmed via arXiv API 2026-04-20

pairs.description: SIR epidemic model (compartmental infectious disease) ↔ rumour spreading on networks

side_a.title: Epidemic spreading in scale-free networks
side_a.notes: PRL 86, 3200; corrected from wrong ID cond-mat/0010028 (which was a superconductor paper); confirmed via arXiv API 2026-04-20

side_b.title: Dynamics of rumor spreading in complex networks
side_b.notes: Phys. Rev. E 69, 066130; confirmed via arXiv API 2026-04-20

pairs.description: Percolation theory (graph connectivity thresholds) ↔ epidemic threshold on networks

side_a.title: Random graphs with arbitrary degree distributions and their applications
side_a.notes: Phys. Rev. E 64, 026118; confirmed via arXiv API 2026-04-20

side_b.title: The spread of epidemic disease on networks
side_b.notes: Phys. Rev. E 66, 016128; corrected from wrong ID cond-mat/0111100; confirmed via arXiv API 2026-04-20

pairs.description: Lotka-Volterra predator-prey dynamics ↔ competitive market dynamics (econophysics)

side_a.title: Modelling food webs
side_a.notes: Chapter in Handbook of Graphs and Networks (Wiley-VCH 2003); corrected from wrong ID cond-mat/0110359; confirmed via arXiv API 2026-04-20

side_b.title: Wealth condensation in a simple model of economy
side_b.notes: Physica A 282, 536; confirmed via arXiv API 2026-04-20

pairs.description: Turing reaction-diffusion instability (self-organised spatial patterns) ↔ spatial economic agglomeration (core-periphery geography)

side_a.title: Turing patterns in network-organized activator-inhibitor systems
side_a.notes: Nature Physics 6, 544; confirmed via arXiv API 2026-04-20

side_b.title: Interacting Individuals Leading to Zipf's Law
side_b.notes: Phys. Rev. Lett. 1998; corrected from wrong ID cond-mat/9907246 (which was a different paper); confirmed via arXiv API 2026-04-20

pairs.description: Kuramoto phase-oscillator model ↔ biological/engineering synchronization (fireflies, power grids)
pairs.evaluable_note: side_b (Rohden 2012 PRL 109, 064101) has no arXiv preprint — journal-only

side_a.title: Synchronization in complex networks
side_a.notes: Physics Reports 469, 93; confirmed via arXiv API 2026-04-20

side_b.title: Self-organized synchronization in decentralized power grids
side_b.notes: PRL 109, 064101; original ID 1106.3375 was a quantum Hall paper (wrong); correct Rohden 2012 PRL paper not found on arXiv

pairs.description: Belief propagation / message passing (graphical model inference) ↔ cavity method (statistical physics of disordered systems)
pairs.evaluable_note: side_a (Kabashima/Saad Europhys.Lett. 45, 97, 1999) not found on arXiv

side_a.title: Statistical physics of error-correcting codes
side_a.notes: Europhys. Lett. 45, 97; original ID cond-mat/9901122 was a superconductor paper (wrong); correct arXiv preprint not found

side_b.title: The cavity method at zero temperature
side_b.notes: J. Stat. Phys. 111, 1; confirmed via arXiv API 2026-04-20

pairs.description: Ant colony optimisation (swarm intelligence, stigmergic search) ↔ stochastic gradient descent with noise (adaptive optimisation)
pairs.evaluable_note: side_a (Dorigo/Blum ACO intro) not posted to arXiv

side_a.title: Ant colony optimization: A new meta-heuristic
side_a.notes: cs.NE conference paper; original ID cs.NE/0101015 does not exist on arXiv; Dorigo's ACO papers were not posted to arXiv

side_b.title: Adam: A Method for Stochastic Optimization

pairs.description: Random walk / anomalous diffusion theory ↔ financial price dynamics (econophysics)
pairs.evaluable_note: side_a (Metzler/Klafter J.Phys.A 37 R161, 2004) not found on arXiv

side_a.title: The restaurant at the end of the random walk: Recent developments in the description of anomalous transport by fractional dynamics
side_a.notes: J. Phys. A 37 R161; original ID cond-mat/0307565 was a fluctuation-dissipation paper (wrong); correct arXiv preprint not found

side_b.title: Scaling of the distribution of price fluctuations of individual companies
side_b.notes: Phys. Rev. E 60, 6519; corrected from wrong ID cond-mat/9906434; confirmed via arXiv API 2026-04-20
